reviews.comment:
Histórico Automóvil Club Argentino, debe ser de los últimos que quedan con ése formato de techo de tejas a dos aguas sobre la playa, romántico y no mucha afluencia de público. Para realizar una carga rápida, mate y continuar, el personal propone buena y esmerada atención, todos los medios de pago, venta de repuestos de mecánica ligera y sanitarios. Aprovechen por que está pronta a ser remodelada.

(Translated by Google)
The historic Automóvil Club Argentino is one of the last remaining gas stations with its distinctive gabled roof overlooking the beach—a romantic spot that doesn't attract large crowds. For a quick refuel, some mate, and to continue your journey, the staff offers excellent and attentive service, accepts all forms of payment, and sells spare parts for light mechanical needs and restrooms. Take advantage of this opportunity, as it's about to be remodeled.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMTgyTUhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien lugar. Se puede descanzar un rato. Tiene para comer decentemente, al medio dia se suele llenar. Los baños están en buenas condiciones de uso. Esta en un lugar estratégico para cargar nafta y estirar las piernas antes de llegar a la capital

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest for a while. It has decent food options, and it tends to get crowded by midday. The bathrooms are in good working order. It's in a strategic location for filling up with gas and stretching your legs before reaching the capital.
